exercises.sentence: Yo ______ terminar mi tarea antes de salir a jugar.
exercises.translation: I must finish my homework before going out to play.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ ser más amable con mis vecinos.
exercises.translation: I should be kinder to my neighbors.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ ir al gimnasio todos los días.
exercises.translation: I must go to the gym every day.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ devolver el libro ayer, pero se me olvidó.
exercises.translation: I should have returned the book yesterday, but I forgot.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ pagar la cuenta en cuanto llegué al restaurante.
exercises.translation: I had to pay the bill as soon as I arrived at the restaurant.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ estudiar más para el examen difícil del lunes.
exercises.translation: I should have studied more for Monday's difficult exam.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo ______ acostarme temprano cada noche.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I had to go to bed early every night.

exercises.sentence: Antes, yo ______ trabajar horas extra todos los viernes.
exercises.translation: Before, I used to have to work overtime every Friday.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ estudiar mucho cuando estaba en la universidad.
exercises.translation: I had to study a lot when I was at the university.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ comprar un regalo para tu cumpleaños, pero no tengo dinero.
exercises.translation: I should buy a gift for your birthday, but I don't have money.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ decirte la verdad sobre lo que pasó.
exercises.translation: I should tell you the truth about what happened.

exercises.sentence: Yo ______ descansar más si quiero recuperar mi salud.
exercises.translation: I should rest more if I want to recover my health.

exercises.sentence: Mañana yo ______ entregar el proyecto final al profesor.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will have to hand in the final project to the professor.

exercises.sentence: Pronto yo ______ buscar un nuevo apartamento más cerca del trabajo.
exercises.translation: Soon I will have to look for a new apartment closer to work.

exercises.sentence: Si sigo así, yo ______ estudiar mucho más para aprobar.
exercises.translation: If I continue like this, I will have to study much more to pass.
